economic_notes: GBEs include Yellow Quill Holdings Inc., Yellow Quill Development Corporation, Yellow Quill Urban Services Inc., Yellow Quill Store A Band Enterprise, and Yellow Quill Child and Family Prevention Services Inc. YQ Holdings reported net loss of $386,940 for year ended Dec 31, 2020.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to verify accounts payable balance. Financial statements are for year ended March 31, 2021 but were signed March 6, 2024 - approximately 3 years late. Five GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Total government transfers estimated as ISC + FNIHB + CMHC + Government of Saskatchewan = $16,440,020; if STC and STC Health are included as government transfers total rises; figure used here includes ISC ($14,641,780), FNIHB ($1,593,578), CMHC ($202,107), Trust funds federal ($505,647), Gov't of SK ($555) = $16,943,667 plus STC ($1,377,732) and STC Health ($2,775,662) subtracted as not strictly government = $16,943,667. OSR computed accordingly. Restricted cash total combines restricted cash ($546,911) and CMHC replacement reserve ($5,039). Current liabilities include accounts payable ($1,084,011), current LTD ($189,812), current CMHC ($99,953). Long-term debt total includes non-current LTD ($5,155,777) plus non-current CMHC ($2,690,137). Annual debt service is principal repayments: LTD $196,454 + CMHC $96,415 = $292,869.
